arts.ttl: Atalanta vs. Roma, the final matchday 36 fixture
arts.sum: Roma have lost four of their last five away games (W1) against Atalanta in Serie A: as many defeats as the Giallorossi suffered in their previous 13 away games (W6 D3) against the Bergamo side in the competition – a period in which the Nerazzurri have never repeated the same result for two games in a row. Roma are the side that have won the most games by a 1-0 scoreline in the big five European Leagues this season: nine times - eight of which have come under Claudio Ranieri - including all of the last three matches; they have never won four games in a row with this scoreline in Serie A.
